TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Li-ang-ha-te_Yu-la, title = Li-ang-ha-te_Yu-la, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Li-ang-ha-te_Yu-la} }

S.FORM: == Li-ang-ha-te. Yu-laśĚéśėāŚďąŚĺ∑¬∑Śį§śčČ == nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ sumamad i Zuy-se "caypic seppic ‚Äď caypic tupic" śó©ŚĻīśĖľÁĎěŚ£ę(1707-1727) caypic seppic mihcaan sepat a bulat caylim dimiad, Li-ang-ha-te. Yu-la pilecuhan i Zuy-se-pa-e-say, ci ama ni Paw-lu. Yu-la u kilisetu nu cia-e-wen-cun a buksi, wina ci Ma-ke-li-te'.Pu-lu-ke', u tuas nuheni yadah ku sitangahay a Ku-tan-sye-ce. sakasepat ci Yu-la ni lecuhan a sakakaay nu tatamaan, tatusa ku sabana nida ci An-na-ma-li-ya atu Ma-li-ya. Ma-ke-ta-lay-na, idaw henay ku saba ci Ye-han. hay-in-li-si. caay ka teneng ni lecuhan ci Yu-li, mabulaw ku nuheni namaka Pa-say-e katukuh i inakaan a Li-n, itida satu ci Yu-la a maudip nu wawaan. 1707ŚĻī4śúą15śó•, . nanuwawa, ci Yu-la namaka ci amaan nida micapi atu minanam tu susye, ci yama nida natayda i Pa-e tabakiay a cacudadan minanam tu Zuy-se su-sye-cia ci Ya-ke-pu'.Puo-nu-li a cudadan. i waluay henay ku mihcaan, ci Yu-la tlumaen nida i Pa-e-say a bai nu lumaan mueneng, sa micuda tu tidaay a La-tin cacudadan. palawpesen nu cacudadan ku su-sye pinanaman, ci ama nida wananan nida ku manamuhay tu su-sye a sininga ci Ye-han-nie-se mala papasubana' tu su-sye ci nidaan. . caypic tusep mihcaan, caylu a mihcaan ni Yu-la micumud tu Pa-say-e tabakiay nu cacudadan minanam, hatidaay nu mihcaan inai' ku micudaday tu tabakiay a cacudadan. mangalay ci ama nida tu ci Yu-laan muculil tu naculilan nida, malabuksi, yukiwan ni ama nida, micuda ci Yu-la u sakay sen-sye ku cudadan nida, Si-la-yi atu Si-pu-lay-yi. 1720ŚĻī,13 . caypic tulim mihcaan, ci Ye-han.puoneli a tusaay nu tatamaan a wawa ci Ni-ku-la.Puo-nu-li "sakakaay" atu Dan-ji-e. Puo-nu-li "sakatusa a wawa"mmicukud i Sen-pi-de-paw a E'-Kuo-hu-cia kesyeyun mikuli. tawya u nuheni mihusiw ci Yu-laan, anuidaw ku kakulian, papatayni hantu nu niyam ci Yu-la itini mikuli. caypic tunem mihcaan pitu a bulat lucay a demiad, ci Ni-ku-la mamuciw mapatay, cacay a mihcaan ci nida i tida. caypic tupic mihcaan lima a bulat caypic a dimiad, makatuku ci Yu-la i Sen-pi-de-paw, caay ka tenes namaka padekuan a misakakawaw alaw tapabaw tayda i susye a kitidaan misakakawaw. mapulung cinida atu ci Dan-ni-e mueneng, maladay tu a tatusa misakakawaw. ci Yu-la amelik matineng tu tu E'-YI, mananamtu tu itidaay a nikaudip, tawya sikawaw aca ci nida tu E'-kuo nu kayngu a misaydan. caypic lusep mihcaan ci Pi-de ese mapatay, nikalingesan cinidaan sinikakapahan tu. ci Yu-la itida i cacudadan kasenu' satu a tapabaw, itida i caypic lucay a mihcaan mala wulisye sadan ku kawaw nida. miliyas cinida tu E'-kuo nu kayguan, kaiyan nida mala sakakaay. nikudan nu tusaay a mihcaan, ci Dan-ni-e. puo-nu-li malibut tu ci nida i Sen-pi-de-paw tu nikaada nutaw i cinidaan, mutikuaca tayda i Pa-say-e, ci Yu-la malasusye a cozen. 1730 . caypic lusip mihcaan cacay a bulat pitu a demiad, ci Yu-la atu Zuy-se mikulitay ci Ke-aw-e-ke. Ke-say-e a tataynaan a wawaw ci Kay-sa-lin-na. Ke-e-say mikikun, micakay ku nuheni tatusa tu luma' i Nei-wa sadipasan, sabaw tulu ku nilecuhan nuheni tu wawaw, tatulu ku tatamaan atu tatusa ku tataynaan a wawaw nuheni katuku tu balaki ku nikaudip. 1734ŚĻī1śúą7śó•, . nikamenuan, caypic piccay mihcaan idaw ku picidekan nu heni a kawawan, makatuduh ku luma' ni Yu-la mami matuduh ku cancanan nai' ku liwanliwanaca, ku adidi mapatay, nika, nisulitan ni Yu-la tumian idaw henay, duma u nisulidan tu sakay bunacan a cudadan adidi ku malawpesay, hanidatengan nu tada punuan, alaw mahedek nida kina kalepilepian nu matuduhay a cudadan. . caypic piclu mihcaan, sayaway ni Yu-la a acawa ci Kay-sa-lin-na mapatay. sa siacawaw ci Yu-la, caypic picnem mihcaan, cinida atu sakacaay kalecad nu winaan a sabaan nu acawanida ci Sa-le-mea. A-pi-kay-e.Ke-say-e mikiku. katukuh nikapatay. 1773ŚĻī, .
S.PHON: == r~…ĺi-aŇč-ńßa-t…ô. ju-r~…ĺa******* == nikaudip** sumamad i zuj-s…ô " ¶ajpi ¶ s…ôppi ¶ * ¶ajpi ¶ tupi ¶" *****(****-****) ¶ajpi ¶ s…ôppi ¶ mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺat ¶ajr~…ĺim dimiad, r~…ĺi-aŇč-ńßa-t…ô. ju-r~…ĺa pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i zuj-s…ô-pa-…ô-saj, ¶i ama ni paw-r~…ĺu. ju-r~…ĺa u kir~…ĺis…ôtu nu ¶ia-…ô-w…ôn- ¶un a buksi, wina ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ °.pu-r~…ĺu-k…ô Ē~ °, u tuas nuńß…ôni jadańß ku sitaŇčańßaj a ku-tan-sj…ô- ¶…ô. sakas…ôpat ¶i ju-r~…ĺa ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a sakakaaj nu tatamaan, tatusa ku sabana nida ¶i an-na-ma-r~…ĺi-ja atu ma-r~…ĺi-ja. ma-k…ô-ta-r~…ĺaj-na, idaw ńß…ônaj ku saba ¶i j…ô-ńßan. ńßaj-in-r~…ĺi-si. ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôŇč ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i ju-r~…ĺi, mabur~…ĺaw ku nuńß…ôni namaka pa-saj-…ô katukuńß i inakaan a r~…ĺi-n, itida satu ¶i ju-r~…ĺa a maudip nu wawaan. **********, . nanuwawa, ¶i ju-r~…ĺa namaka ¶i amaan nida mi ¶api atu minanam tu susj…ô, ¶i jama nida natajda i pa-…ô tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu zuj-s…ô su-sj…ô- ¶ia ¶i ja-k…ô-pu Ē~ °.puo-nu-r~…ĺi a ¶udadan. i war~…ĺuaj ńß…ônaj ku mińß ¶aan, ¶i ju-r~…ĺa tr~…ĺuma…ôn nida i pa-…ô-saj a bai nu r~…ĺumaan mu…ôn…ôŇč, sa mi ¶uda tu tidaaj a r~…ĺa-tin ¶a ¶udadan. par~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nu ¶a ¶udadan ku su-sj…ô pinanaman, ¶i ama nida wananan nida ku manamuńßaj tu su-sj…ô a siniŇča ¶i j…ô-ńßan-ni…ô-s…ô mar~…ĺa papasubana Ē~ ° tu su-sj…ô ¶i nidaan. . ¶ajpi ¶ tus…ôp mińß ¶aan, ¶ajr~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan ni ju-r~…ĺa mi ¶umud tu pa-saj-…ô tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan minanam, ńßatidaaj nu mińß ¶aan inai Ē~ ° ku mi ¶udadaj tu tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan. maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶i ama nida tu ¶i ju-r~…ĺaan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu na ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nida, mar~…ĺabuksi, jukiwan ni ama nida, mi ¶uda ¶i ju-r~…ĺa u sakaj s…ôn-sj…ô ku ¶udadan nida, si-r~…ĺa-ji atu si-pu-r~…ĺaj-ji. *****,** . ¶ajpi ¶ tur~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, ¶i j…ô-ńßan.puon…ôr~…ĺi a tusaaj nu tatamaan a wawa ¶i ni-ku-r~…ĺa.puo-nu-r~…ĺi "sakakaaj" atu dan-ji-…ô. puo-nu-r~…ĺi "sakatusa a wawa"mmi ¶ukud i s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw a …ô Ē~ °-kuo-ńßu- ¶ia k…ôsj…ôun mikur~…ĺi. tawja u nuńß…ôni mińßusiw ¶i ju-r~…ĺaan, anuidaw ku kakur~…ĺian, papatajni ńßantu nu nijam ¶i ju-r~…ĺa itini mikur~…ĺi. ¶ajpi ¶ tun…ôm mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺat r~…ĺu ¶aj a d…ômiad, ¶i ni-ku-r~…ĺa mamu ¶iw mapataj, ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan ¶i nida i tida. ¶ajpi ¶ tupi ¶ mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺat ¶ajpi ¶ a dimiad, makatuku ¶i ju-r~…ĺa i s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs namaka pad…ôkuan a misakakawaw ar~…ĺaw tapabaw tajda i susj…ô a kitidaan misakakawaw. mapur~…ĺuŇč ¶inida atu ¶i dan-ni-…ô mu…ôn…ôŇč, mar~…ĺadaj tu a tatusa misakakawaw. ¶i ju-r~…ĺa am…ôr~…ĺik matin…ôŇč tu tu …ô Ē~ °-ji, mananamtu tu itidaaj a nikaudip, tawja sikawaw a ¶a ¶i nida tu …ô Ē~ °-kuo nu kajŇču a misajdan. ¶ajpi ¶ r~…ĺus…ôp mińß ¶aan ¶i pi-d…ô …ôs…ô mapataj, nikar~…ĺiŇč…ôsan ¶inidaan sinikakapańßan tu. ¶i ju-r~…ĺa itida i ¶a ¶udadan kas…ônu Ē~ ° satu a tapabaw, itida i ¶ajpi ¶ r~…ĺu ¶aj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa wur~…ĺisj…ô sadan ku kawaw nida. mir~…ĺijas ¶inida tu …ô Ē~ °-kuo nu kajguan, kaijan nida mar~…ĺa sakakaaj. nikudan nu tusaaj a mińß ¶aan, ¶i dan-ni-…ô. puo-nu-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺibut tu ¶i nida i s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw tu nikaada nutaw i ¶inidaan, mutikua ¶a tajda i pa-saj-…ô, ¶i ju-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺasusj…ô a ¶oz…ôn. **** . ¶ajpi ¶ r~…ĺusip mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺat pitu a d…ômiad, ¶i ju-r~…ĺa atu zuj-s…ô mikur~…ĺitaj ¶i k…ô-aw-…ô-k…ô. k…ô-saj-…ô a tatajnaan a wawaw ¶i kaj-sa-r~…ĺin-na. k…ô-…ô-saj mikikun, mi ¶akaj ku nuńß…ôni tatusa tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i n…ôi-wa sadipasan, sabaw tur~…ĺu ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nuńß…ôni tu wawaw, tatur~…ĺu ku tatamaan atu tatusa ku tatajnaan a wawaw nuńß…ôni katuku tu bar~…ĺaki ku nikaudip. *********, . nikam…ônuan, ¶ajpi ¶ pi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan idaw ku pi ¶id…ôkan nu ńß…ôni a kawawan, makatuduńß ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni ju-r~…ĺa mami matuduńß ku ¶an ¶anan nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwanr~…ĺiwana ¶a, ku adidi mapataj, nika, nisur~…ĺitan ni ju-r~…ĺa tumian idaw ńß…ônaj, duma u nisur~…ĺidan tu sakaj buna ¶an a ¶udadan adidi ku mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj, ńßanidat…ôŇčan nu tada punuan, ar~…ĺaw mańß…ôd…ôk nida kina kar~…ĺ…ôpir~…ĺ…ôpian nu matuduńßaj a ¶udadan. . ¶ajpi ¶ pi ¶r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, sajawaj ni ju-r~…ĺa a a ¶awa ¶i kaj-sa-r~…ĺin-na mapataj. sa sia ¶awaw ¶i ju-r~…ĺa, ¶ajpi ¶ pi ¶n…ôm mińß ¶aan, ¶inida atu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu winaan a sabaan nu a ¶awanida ¶i sa-r~…ĺ…ô-m…ôa. a-pi-kaj-…ô.k…ô-saj-…ô mikiku. katukuńß nikapataj. *****, .
S.FORM: == Li-ang-ha-te. Yu-laśĚéśėāŚďąŚĺ∑¬∑Śį§śčČ == nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ sumamad i Zuy-se "caypic seppic ‚Äď caypic tupic" śó©ŚĻīśĖľÁĎěŚ£ę(1707-1727) caypic seppic mihcaan sepat a bulat caylim dimiad, Li-ang-ha-te. Yu-la pilecuhan i Zuy-se-pa-e-say, ci ama ni Paw-lu. Yu-la u kilisetu nu cia-e-wen-cun a buksi, wina ci Ma-ke-li-te'.Pu-lu-ke', u tuas nuheni yadah ku sitangahay a Ku-tan-sye-ce. sakasepat ci Yu-la ni lecuhan a sakakaay nu tatamaan, tatusa ku sabana nida ci An-na-ma-li-ya atu Ma-li-ya. Ma-ke-ta-lay-na, idaw henay ku saba ci Ye-han. hay-in-li-si. caay ka teneng ni lecuhan ci Yu-li, mabulaw ku nuheni namaka Pa-say-e katukuh i inakaan a Li-n, itida satu ci Yu-la a maudip nu wawaan. 1707ŚĻī4śúą15śó•, . nanuwawa, ci Yu-la namaka ci amaan nida micapi atu minanam tu susye, ci yama nida natayda i Pa-e tabakiay a cacudadan minanam tu Zuy-se su-sye-cia ci Ya-ke-pu'.Puo-nu-li a cudadan. i waluay henay ku mihcaan, ci Yu-la tlumaen nida i Pa-e-say a bai nu lumaan mueneng, sa micuda tu tidaay a La-tin cacudadan. palawpesen nu cacudadan ku su-sye pinanaman, ci ama nida wananan nida ku manamuhay tu su-sye a sininga ci Ye-han-nie-se mala papasubana' tu su-sye ci nidaan. . caypic tusep mihcaan, caylu a mihcaan ni Yu-la micumud tu Pa-say-e tabakiay nu cacudadan minanam, hatidaay nu mihcaan inai' ku micudaday tu tabakiay a cacudadan. mangalay ci ama nida tu ci Yu-laan muculil tu naculilan nida, malabuksi, yukiwan ni ama nida, micuda ci Yu-la u sakay sen-sye ku cudadan nida, Si-la-yi atu Si-pu-lay-yi. 1720ŚĻī,13 . caypic tulim mihcaan, ci Ye-han.puoneli a tusaay nu tatamaan a wawa ci Ni-ku-la.Puo-nu-li "sakakaay" atu Dan-ji-e. Puo-nu-li "sakatusa a wawa"mmicukud i Sen-pi-de-paw a E'-Kuo-hu-cia kesyeyun mikuli. tawya u nuheni mihusiw ci Yu-laan, anuidaw ku kakulian, papatayni hantu nu niyam ci Yu-la itini mikuli. caypic tunem mihcaan pitu a bulat lucay a demiad, ci Ni-ku-la mamuciw mapatay, cacay a mihcaan ci nida i tida. caypic tupic mihcaan lima a bulat caypic a dimiad, makatuku ci Yu-la i Sen-pi-de-paw, caay ka tenes namaka padekuan a misakakawaw alaw tapabaw tayda i susye a kitidaan misakakawaw. mapulung cinida atu ci Dan-ni-e mueneng, maladay tu a tatusa misakakawaw. ci Yu-la amelik matineng tu tu E'-YI, mananamtu tu itidaay a nikaudip, tawya sikawaw aca ci nida tu E'-kuo nu kayngu a misaydan. caypic lusep mihcaan ci Pi-de ese mapatay, nikalingesan cinidaan sinikakapahan tu. ci Yu-la itida i cacudadan kasenu' satu a tapabaw, itida i caypic lucay a mihcaan mala wulisye sadan ku kawaw nida. miliyas cinida tu E'-kuo nu kayguan, kaiyan nida mala sakakaay. nikudan nu tusaay a mihcaan, ci Dan-ni-e. puo-nu-li malibut tu ci nida i Sen-pi-de-paw tu nikaada nutaw i cinidaan, mutikuaca tayda i Pa-say-e, ci Yu-la malasusye a cozen. 1730 . caypic lusip mihcaan cacay a bulat pitu a demiad, ci Yu-la atu Zuy-se mikulitay ci Ke-aw-e-ke. Ke-say-e a tataynaan a wawaw ci Kay-sa-lin-na. Ke-e-say mikikun, micakay ku nuheni tatusa tu luma' i Nei-wa sadipasan, sabaw tulu ku nilecuhan nuheni tu wawaw, tatulu ku tatamaan atu tatusa ku tataynaan a wawaw nuheni katuku tu balaki ku nikaudip. 1734ŚĻī1śúą7śó•, . nikamenuan, caypic piccay mihcaan idaw ku picidekan nu heni a kawawan, makatuduh ku luma' ni Yu-la mami matuduh ku cancanan nai' ku liwanliwanaca, ku adidi mapatay, nika, nisulitan ni Yu-la tumian idaw henay, duma u nisulidan tu sakay bunacan a cudadan adidi ku malawpesay, hanidatengan nu tada punuan, alaw mahedek nida kina kalepilepian nu matuduhay a cudadan. . caypic piclu mihcaan, sayaway ni Yu-la a acawa ci Kay-sa-lin-na mapatay. sa siacawaw ci Yu-la, caypic picnem mihcaan, cinida atu sakacaay kalecad nu winaan a sabaan nu acawanida ci Sa-le-mea. A-pi-kay-e.Ke-say-e mikiku. katukuh nikapatay. 1773ŚĻī, .

tu na ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nida, mar~…ĺabuksi, jukiwan ni ama nida, mi ¶uda ¶i ju-r~…ĺa u sakaj s…ôn-sj…ô ku ¶udadan nida, si-r~…ĺa-ji atu si-pu-r~…ĺaj-ji. *****,** . ¶ajpi ¶ tur~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, ¶i mikur~…ĺi. tawja u nuńß…ôni mińßusiw ¶i ju-r~…ĺaan, anuidaw ku kakur~…ĺian, papatajni ńßantu nu nijam ¶i ju-r~…ĺa itini mikur~…ĺi. ¶ajpi ¶ tun…ôm mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺat r~…ĺu ¶aj a d…ômiad, ¶i ni-ku-r~…ĺa mamu ¶iw mapataj, ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan ¶i nida i tida. ¶ajpi ¶ tupi ¶ mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺat ¶ajpi ¶ a dimiad, makatuku ¶i ju-r~…ĺa i s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs namaka pad…ôkuan a misakakawaw ar~…ĺaw tapabaw tajda i susj…ô a kitidaan misakakawaw. mapur~…ĺuŇč ¶inida atu ¶i dan-ni-…ô mu…ôn…ôŇč, mar~…ĺadaj tu a tatusa misakakawaw. ¶i ju-r~…ĺa am…ôr~…ĺik matin…ôŇč tu tu …ô Ē~ °-ji, mananamtu tu itidaaj a nikaudip, tawja sikawaw a ¶a ¶i nida tu …ô Ē~ °-kuo nu kajŇču a misajdan. ¶ajpi ¶ r~…ĺus…ôp mińß ¶aan ¶i pi-d…ô …ôs…ô mapataj, nikar~…ĺiŇč…ôsan ¶inidaan sinikakapańßan tu. ¶i ju-r~…ĺa itida i ¶a ¶udadan kas…ônu Ē~ ° satu a tapabaw, itida i ¶ajpi ¶ r~…ĺu ¶aj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa wur~…ĺisj…ô sadan ku kawaw nida. mir~…ĺijas ¶inida tu …ô Ē~ °-kuo nu kajguan, kaijan nida mar~…ĺa sakakaaj. nikudan nu tusaaj a mińß ¶aan, ¶i dan-ni-…ô. puo-nu-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺibut tu ¶i nida i s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw tu nikaada nutaw i ¶inidaan, mutikua ¶a tajda i pa-saj-…ô, ¶i ju-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺasusj…ô a ¶oz…ôn. **** . ¶ajpi ¶ r~…ĺusip mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺat pitu a d…ômiad, ¶i ju-r~…ĺa atu zuj-s…ô mikur~…ĺitaj ¶i k…ô-aw-…ô-k…ô. k…ô-saj-…ô a tatajnaan a wawaw ¶i kaj-sa-r~…ĺin-na. k…ô-…ô-saj mikikun, mi ¶akaj ku nuńß…ôni tatusa tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i n…ôi-wa sadipasan, sabaw tur~…ĺu ku nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nuńß…ôni tu wawaw, tatur~…ĺu ku tatamaan atu tatusa ku tatajnaan a wawaw nuńß…ôni katuku tu bar~…ĺaki ku nikaudip. *********, . nikam…ônuan, ¶ajpi ¶ pi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan idaw ku pi ¶id…ôkan nu ńß…ôni a kawawan, makatuduńß ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ni ju-r~…ĺa mami matuduńß ku ¶an ¶anan nai Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwanr~…ĺiwana ¶a, ku adidi mapataj, nika, nisur~…ĺitan ni ju-r~…ĺa tumian idaw ńß…ônaj, duma u nisur~…ĺidan tu sakaj buna ¶an a ¶udadan adidi ku mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj, ńßanidat…ôŇčan nu tada punuan, ar~…ĺaw mańß…ôd…ôk nida kina kar~…ĺ…ôpir~…ĺ…ôpian nu matuduńßaj a ¶udadan. . ¶ajpi ¶ pi ¶r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, sajawaj ni ju-r~…ĺa a a ¶awa ¶i kaj-sa-r~…ĺin-na mapataj. sa sia ¶awaw ¶i ju-r~…ĺa, ¶ajpi ¶ pi ¶n…ôm mińß ¶aan, ¶inida atu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu winaan a sabaan nu a ¶awanida ¶i sa-r~…ĺ…ô-m…ôa. a-pi-kaj-…ô.k…ô-saj-…ô mikiku. katukuńß nikapataj. *****, .
